overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a hooded cloak approaching a massive gothic cathedral built into a cliff face. The scene features floating red embers, a purple-tinged night sky with a burning cosmic tree, and ornate stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone approach path to massive gothic cathedral

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the stone path toward the cathedral entrance

entered.detail: massive ornate stone facade with twin towers built into the cliff face
tall ornate stone pillars flanking the approach path
tall ornate stone pillars flanking the approach path
dark rocky cliff rising behind the cathedral structure
glowing red particles floating throughout the air

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide stone path toward an enormous gothic cathedral built into a cliff face. Two ornate stone pillars flank the approach while red embers float in the air, and the massive facade grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral approach with view of burning cosmic sky

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the burning Erdtree glowing in the purple sky above the cathedral
camera tilts back down to face the cathedral entrance

agents.ego_description: character pauses to look up at the burning sky and cathedral towers, then continues forward

entered.detail: massive burning tree with golden-orange flames against purple cosmic clouds
left tower of the cathedral with ornate spires and statues
right tower of the cathedral with ornate spires and statues

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive burning tree glowing in the purple sky above the cathedral towers, showcasing the cosmic scale of the environment, then tilts back down as the character continues toward the entrance.

events.description: character approaches and enters the massive archway doorway into the cathedral

agents.ego_description: character walks up the stone steps and approaches the glowing blue entrance of the cathedral

entered.detail: dark interior visible through the glowing blue archway entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final steps toward the massive archway entrance. The burning sky disappears from view as the character enters the shadow of the doorway, approaching the blue-lit interior threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide approach across a stone path toward the imposing shadow of a gothic cathedral entrance. It begins with the character walking between ornate stone pillars as red embers drift through the air and the massive cliffside facade looms larger in the frame. As the character advances, the camera tilts upward to reveal a colossal burning tree glowing against a purple cosmic sky before tilting back down to resume the forward trajectory. The scene then shifts as the character ascends the final steps toward the massive archway, causing the burning sky to vanish from view. Finally, the camera follows the character into the deep shadow of the doorway, approaching a threshold illuminated by a cold blue light.
